risk.desc: Deployment hinge mechanism may not function properly if spring tension is not correctly set.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough spring tension testing and adjust as necessary.

risk.desc: Burn wire release mechanism could fail if wire is not properly positioned.
risk.mit: Ensure precise wire positioning and conduct burn wire release tests.

risk.desc: Electrical harness routing could be compromised if channel dimensions are incorrect.
risk.mit: Verify channel dimensions and conduct electrical harness routing tests.

risk.desc: Service access flap may not provide adequate access if dimensions are too small.
risk.mit: Review and adjust service access flap dimensions as needed.

risk.desc: Mounting flange may not align properly with adjacent module if clearance is incorrect.
risk.mit: Verify clearance and conduct alignment tests.

physics_paths.path_description: Solar energy captured by photovoltaic cells converted to electrical power.
Heat dissipation from solar panel surface to structure.
Spring-loaded hinge mechanism allows deployment of solar panel.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate a deployable hinge mechanism that allows the solar panel to fold and unfold.
Implement a burn wire release mechanism to deploy the solar panel in space.
Ensure the electrical harness can be routed through the designated channel.

manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures must be removed after machining.
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Inspect for dimensional accuracy and surface finish.

verification_focus.description: Test the solar panel's ability to withstand environmental loads.
Verify the deployment mechanism functions as intended.
Ensure electrical connectivity from solar panel to satellite.

risk.mit: Review latching mechanism design and ensure proper engagement with structure.
